sections.title: 1. General Provisions
paragraphs: These Terms of Use constitute a legal agreement governing your use of the RideYo platform. By using the platform, you are deemed to have accepted these terms. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use the platform.

sections.title: 2. Service Description
paragraphs: RideYo is a digital platform that connects vehicle owners with renters. The platform facilitates vehicle sharing but does not own the vehicles. All vehicles are provided by independent vehicle owners.

subsections.title: 3.1 Registration
list: You must be 18 years of age or older to use the platform
You must hold a valid driver's license
You must provide accurate and up-to-date information
You are responsible for account security

subsections.title: 3.2 Account Types
list: User Account: You can rent vehicles
Vehicle Owner Account: You can list your vehicle for rent and also rent vehicles

subsections.title: 4.1 Reservation
list: Reservations are binding once confirmed
A hold is placed for per-minute rentals
Full payment is required for hourly and daily rentals
Prices are set by the vehicle owner

subsections.title: 4.2 Vehicle Handover
list: Vehicle pickup and return must occur at the scheduled times
The vehicle's condition must be checked at handover
Fuel level must be returned at the same level as at pickup

subsections.title: 4.3 Usage
list: Only you may drive the vehicle (as the licensed driver)
You must comply with traffic regulations
You may not use the vehicle for commercial purposes (unless otherwise stated)
You may not drive under the influence of alcohol or drugs

sections.title: 5. Payment and Billing
list: All payments must be made through the platform
Per-minute rental: Charged for the time used
Hourly rental: Charged at the specified hourly rate
Daily rental: Charged in 24-hour periods
Late return incurs additional fees
Platform service fee is 15%

sections.title: 6. Cancellation Policy
list: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before rental start
Cancellation within 24 hours: 50% refund
Cancellation after rental start: No refund
Vehicle owner cancellation: Full refund + 20% compensation

subsections.title: 7.1 Coverage
list: All vehicles are covered by comprehensive insurance
Mandatory traffic insurance is included
Minor damage deductible: 500 TL
Major damage deductible: 2,000 TL

subsections.title: 7.2 Responsibilities
list: Traffic fines are the renter's responsibility
Accidents must be reported immediately
Intentional damage is fully the renter's responsibility

sections.title: 8. Rules for Vehicle Owners
list: Your vehicle's registration, insurance, and inspection must be current
The vehicle must be delivered clean and in working condition
Pricing must be fair and aligned with market conditions
You are obligated to honor reservations
Vehicle specifications must be stated accurately and completely

sections.title: 9. Prohibited Conduct
list: Off-platform payment or communication
Providing false information or documents
Harassment or threats toward other users
Attempting to manipulate systems
Using vehicles for illegal activities

sections.title: 10. Account Suspension and Termination
paragraphs: RideYo reserves the right to suspend or terminate your account in case of violation of these terms. Legal action may be initiated in cases of serious violations.

sections.title: 11. Disclaimer
paragraphs: RideYo is an intermediary platform between vehicle owners and renters. We do not guarantee the quality, safety, or suitability of vehicles. We are not a party to disputes between users.

sections.title: 12. Applicable Law
paragraphs: These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of the Republic of Türkiye. Disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Trabzon.

sections.title: 13. Changes
paragraphs: RideYo reserves the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Significant changes will be communicated to users. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

sections.title: 14. Contact
paragraphs: For questions about these Terms of Use:
Email: destek@ride-yo.com
Address: Atatürk Alanı, Devlet Sahil Yolu Cd., Trabzon, Türkiye

sections.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: At RideYo, we are committed to protecting the privacy of our users. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data.

subsections.title: 2.1 Personal Information
list: First and last name
Email address
Phone number
Credit card information (encrypted)
Driver's license information
Address information

subsections.title: 2.2 Automatically Collected Information
list: IP address
Browser type and version
Device information
Location information (with your consent)
Platform usage data

sections.title: 3. Use of Information
paragraphs: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
list: Providing vehicle rental services
Processing payments
Providing customer support
Developing and improving the platform
Security and fraud prevention
Fulfilling legal obligations
Sending personalized offers and notifications (with your consent)

sections.title: 4. Information Sharing
paragraphs: We may share your personal information with third parties in the following cases:
list: With vehicle owners to facilitate rental transactions
With payment processors for secure payment infrastructure
With official authorities as required by law
With service providers for platform operations

paragraphs: Your information is never sold or rented to third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: 5. Data Security
paragraphs: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your personal data:
list: SSL/TLS encryption
Secure data storage
Regular security audits
Limited access controls
Strong encryption protocols

sections.title: 6. Cookies
paragraphs: Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. Cookies are small text files stored by your browser. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
paragraphs: Under KVKK (Turkish Personal Data Protection Law), you have the following rights:
list: To learn whether your personal data is being processed
To request information if it has been processed
To learn the purpose of processing and whether it is used appropriately
To know third parties to whom data is transferred domestically or abroad
To request correction if incomplete or inaccurate
To request deletion or destruction
To object to results arising solely from automated analysis of your data to your detriment

sections.title: 8. Children's Privacy
paragraphs: Our services are not designed for individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from individuals under 18.

sections.title: 9. Changes
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. When significant changes occur, we will notify you by email or through the platform.

sections.title: 10. Contact
paragraphs: For questions about our Privacy Policy:
Email: gizlilik@ride-yo.com
Address: Atatürk Alanı, Devlet Sahil Yolu Cd., Trabzon, Türkiye

kvkk.title: KVKK Disclosure Notice
kvkk.lastUpdated: Information Under the Personal Data Protection Law

sections.title: 1. Data Controller
paragraphs: Pursuant to Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data ("KVKK"), your personal data may be processed by RideYo as the data controller within the scope described below.
Company Name: RideYo Teknoloji A.Ş.
Address: Atatürk Alanı, Devlet Sahil Yolu Cd., Trabzon
Email: kvkk@ride-yo.com

subsections.title: 2.1 Identity Information
list: First and last name
Turkish ID number
Date of birth
Driver's license number and details

subsections.title: 2.2 Contact Information
list: Email address
Phone number
Address information

subsections.title: 2.3 Financial Information
list: Credit card information (encrypted)
Bank account information (for vehicle owners)
Transaction history

subsections.title: 2.4 Vehicle and Rental Information
list: Rented vehicle information
Rental dates and durations
Vehicle photos and descriptions
Location information

subsections.title: 2.5 Transaction Security Information
list: IP address
Cookie records
Device information
Log records

sections.title: 3. Purposes of Processing Personal Data
paragraphs: Your personal data is processed for the following purposes:
list: Providing vehicle rental services
Creating and managing user accounts
Processing payments
Customer relationship management and support services
Security and fraud prevention
Fulfilling legal obligations
Platform development and improvement
Statistical analysis and reporting
Marketing and promotional activities (with your explicit consent)

sections.title: 4. Transfer of Personal Data
paragraphs: Your personal data may be transferred for the purposes stated above to:
list: Vehicle owners (for rental transactions)
Payment institutions (for payment processing)
Law firms (for legal proceedings)
Authorized public institutions (for legal requirements)
Business partners and service providers (for platform operations)

paragraphs: Transfers are carried out in compliance with Articles 8 and 9 of KVKK.

sections.title: 5. Method of Collecting Personal Data
paragraphs: Your personal data is collected:
list: Through the website and mobile application
Via registration and membership forms
During rental transactions
Through email, phone, and other communication channels
Through automated systems (cookies, logs)

paragraphs: as described above.

sections.title: 6. Rights of the Data Subject
paragraphs: Pursuant to Article 11 of KVKK, as data subjects you have the following rights:
list: To learn whether your personal data is being processed
To request information if your personal data has been processed
To learn the purpose of processing and whether it is used appropriately
To know third parties to whom your personal data is transferred domestically or abroad
To request correction if your personal data is incomplete or inaccurate
To request deletion or destruction of your personal data under the conditions set forth in Article 7 of KVKK
To request notification of correction, deletion, or destruction to third parties to whom personal data was transferred
To object to results arising solely from automated analysis of processed data to your detriment
To claim compensation for damages arising from unlawful processing of your personal data

sections.title: 7. Exercising Your Rights
paragraphs: To exercise the rights listed above, you may submit your request containing the information necessary to identify you and explanations regarding the right you wish to exercise under Article 11 of KVKK through the following methods:
list: In writing: By sending a wet-signed application letter in person or via notary to Atatürk Alanı, Devlet Sahil Yolu Cd., Trabzon
By email: By sending an application signed with registered electronic mail (KEP), secure electronic signature, or mobile signature to kvkk@ride-yo.com

paragraphs: Your applications will be concluded free of charge within 30 days at the latest, depending on the nature of the request. If the process requires additional cost, the fee determined by the Personal Data Protection Board may be charged.

sections.title: 8. Data Security
paragraphs: As RideYo, we take technical and administrative measures to ensure the security of your personal data. Your data is protected against unauthorized access, loss, and misuse.

sections.title: 9. Changes
paragraphs: This disclosure notice may be changed in line with changes in legal regulations or updates to company policies. Significant changes will be communicated to you.

sections.title: 10. Contact
paragraphs: For questions about KVKK and the processing of your personal data:
Email: kvkk@ride-yo.com
Address: Atatürk Alanı, Devlet Sahil Yolu Cd., Trabzon, Türkiye

sections.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on your device or network server by browsers when you visit websites. At RideYo, we use various cookies on our website and mobile application.

subsections.title: 2.1. Essential Cookies
paragraphs: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They provide basic functions such as security, network management, and accessibility.

subsections.title: 2.2. Functionality Cookies
paragraphs: These remember user preferences to provide a more personalized experience. They store information such as language selection and theme preferences.

subsections.title: 2.3. Performance and Analytics Cookies
paragraphs: These are used to measure and improve website performance. They collect anonymous data such as which pages are visited and how long users stay.

subsections.title: 2.4. Targeting and Advertising Cookies
paragraphs: These are used to display customized advertisements based on users' interests.

sections.title: 3. Cookies We Use
list: Session Cookies: Authentication for logged-in users
Preference Cookies: Language, theme, and display preferences
Security Cookies: Fraud detection and security
Analytics Cookies: Usage statistics and performance measurement
GPS Cookies: For location-based services

sections.title: 4. Cookie Management
paragraphs: You can control, delete, or block cookies through your browser settings. However, disabling some cookies may cause certain website features to not work properly.

subsections.title: Cookie Management in Popular Browsers:
list: Google Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies and other site data
Mozilla Firefox: Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Manage Cookies and website data
Microsoft Edge: Settings → Privacy, search, and services → Cookies

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Cookies
paragraphs: Some third-party service providers on our website (payment systems, map services, analytics tools) may use their own cookies. These cookies are subject to the privacy policies of the respective companies.

sections.title: 6. Cookie Policy Updates
paragraphs: This cookie policy may be updated from time to time. We will inform you of significant changes. Changes to the policy take effect from the date of publication.

sections.title: 7. Contact
paragraphs: For questions about our cookie policy, you can contact us:
Email: info@ride-yo.com
Address: Trabzon, Türkiye

sections.title: General Information
paragraphs: The cancellation and refund conditions for reservations made through the RideYo platform are set out below. Please read these conditions carefully before making a reservation.

subsections.title: 24+ Hours Before — Full Refund
paragraphs: For cancellations made 24 hours or more before the rental start, 100% of the amount paid will be refunded.

subsections.title: 12-24 Hours Before — Partial Refund
paragraphs: For cancellations made 12-24 hours before the rental start, 50% of the amount paid will be refunded.

subsections.title: Less Than 12 Hours — No Refund
paragraphs: For cancellations made less than 12 hours before the rental start, no refund will be issued.

subsections.title: No-show — No Refund
paragraphs: If you fail to show up at the reservation time without notice, no refund will be issued.

sections.title: Vehicle Owner Cancellation Terms
paragraphs: In case of a last-minute cancellation by the vehicle owner:
list: The owner is obligated to provide an alternative vehicle to the renter
If no alternative vehicle is available, the reservation fee will be refunded to the renter at 120%
Repeated cancellations may result in suspension of the vehicle owner's account
RideYo assists in finding a suitable alternative vehicle for the renter

subsections.title: Payment Refunds
list: Refund requests can be made through the app or customer service
Refunds are made to the same payment method used (credit card, debit card)
Credit card refunds appear in the account within 5-10 business days
Debit card refunds appear in the account within 3-5 business days
Refund status is notified via SMS and email

subsections.title: Force Majeure
paragraphs: Full refunds are issued in cases of force majeure such as natural disasters, epidemics, or war. Determination of such circumstances is made by RideYo management.

subsections.title: Vehicle Breakdown
paragraphs: If the vehicle becomes unusable due to a technical breakdown during the rental period, a full refund is issued for the unused period or an alternative vehicle is provided.

subsections.title: Early Return
paragraphs: If the vehicle is returned before the end of the rental period, no refund is issued for the unused time. For daily rentals, early return is calculated at the hourly rate.

sections.title: Contact
paragraphs: For cancellation and refund inquiries, you can reach our 24/7 customer service:
Email: destek@ride-yo.com

sections.title: Introduction
paragraphs: This Distance Sales Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between the renter ("Tenant/Consumer") and the vehicle owner ("Lessor/Seller") renting a vehicle through the RideYo platform, under the provisions of Law No. 6502 on the Protection of Consumers and the Regulation on Distance Contracts.

subsections.title: 1.1. Seller/Service Provider Information
list: Company Name: RideYo Vehicle Rental Services
Address: Müftü Solakzade Mah. Elmadağ Sk. No:2 Kat:2 Palandöken/Erzurum
Email: info@ride-yo.com
Website: www.ride-yo.com

subsections.title: 1.2. Buyer/Consumer
paragraphs: A natural person who rents a vehicle through the RideYo platform, holds a valid driver's license, and accepts the platform terms. Buyer information is recorded during reservation.

sections.title: Article 2: Subject of the Agreement
paragraphs: The subject of this agreement is to determine the rights and obligations of the parties regarding the sale and delivery of the vehicle rental service ordered electronically by the Buyer through the RideYo e-commerce platform owned by the Seller, in accordance with Law No. 6502 on the Protection of Consumers and the Regulation on Distance Contracts.

subsections.title: 3.1. Service Features
list: The type, brand, model, color, and all features of the service are specified on the platform
Rental duration may be per minute, hour, or day
Mileage packages may be specified separately
Total price including taxes is shown before reservation

subsections.title: 3.2. Pricing
list: All prices are stated in Turkish Lira (TL) including VAT
Platform commission fee is 15% of the rental fee
Hourly rate applies in case of late return
Additional fees may apply in case of damage

sections.title: Article 4: Payment Method and Terms
list: Payment can be made by credit card or debit card
Rental fee is collected upon reservation confirmation
All payments are processed through secure payment infrastructure
Card information is encrypted with 256-bit SSL certificate
Card information may be saved (optional)
Deposit amount varies between 500-2000 TL depending on vehicle type

sections.title: Article 5: Performance and Delivery of Service

subsections.title: 5.1. Delivery Terms
list: The vehicle is delivered at the specified location on the specified date and time
A vehicle inspection form is completed before delivery
Existing damage is photographed and recorded
Fuel level and mileage information is recorded

subsections.title: 5.2. Return Terms
list: The vehicle is returned clean at the end of the rental period
Fuel level is restored to the starting level
Damage inspection is performed and reported

sections.title: Article 6: Right of Withdrawal
paragraphs: Pursuant to Article 50 of Law No. 6502 and Article 15 of the Regulation on Distance Contracts, consumers do not have the right of withdrawal in contracts relating to accommodation, transport of goods, car rental, food and beverage supply, and leisure activities to be performed on a specific date or period.
However, as RideYo, the following cancellation policy applies for customer satisfaction:
list: Cancellation up to 24 hours before: 100% refund
Cancellation 12-24 hours before: 50% refund
Cancellation less than 12 hours before: No refund
No-show: No refund

subsections.title: 7.1. Insurance Coverage
list: Mandatory Traffic Insurance (MTPL)
Mini Comprehensive Insurance (provided by RideYo)
Passenger Personal Accident Insurance
24/7 Roadside Assistance

subsections.title: 7.2. Limitations of Liability
list: Use under the influence of alcohol or drugs is not covered by insurance
Use without a license or with an expired license is prohibited
Intentional damage is the consumer's responsibility

sections.title: Article 8: Protection of Personal Data
paragraphs: Personal data of the consumer is processed and protected under Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data. For detailed information, please refer to the Privacy Policy and KVKK Disclosure Notice.

sections.title: Article 9: Dispute Resolution
list: Consumer Arbitration Committees and Consumer Courts have jurisdiction over disputes arising from this agreement
Monetary limits are determined annually by the Ministry of Trade
Erzurum courts and enforcement offices have jurisdiction
Laws of the Republic of Türkiye apply

sections.title: Article 10: Effectiveness
paragraphs: This agreement enters into force upon electronic approval by the Consumer. By ordering the service subject to this agreement, the Consumer is deemed to have accepted all articles of this agreement.

sections.title: Seller/Service Provider Contact Information
paragraphs: RideYo Vehicle Rental Services
Address: Müftü Solakzade Mah. Elmadağ Sk. No:2 Kat:2 Palandöken/Erzurum
Email: info@ride-yo.com
Web: www.ride-yo.com

sections.title: Important Safety Notice
paragraphs: Your safety is our priority at RideYo. By reading the rules below carefully, you can help ensure the safety of yourself and other users.

subsections.title: License Verification
list: You must hold a valid driver's license
License must be held for a minimum of 2 years
Age must be between 21 and 70
Your driver points must be at least 60

subsections.title: Vehicle Inspection
list: Inspect the exterior before taking delivery of the vehicle
Photograph existing damage and scratches
Check the fuel level
Inspect tire condition
Check interior cleanliness
Ensure all documents are in the vehicle

subsections.title: Traffic Rule Compliance
list: Do not exceed speed limits
Do not drive under the influence of alcohol or drugs
Always wear your seatbelt
Do not use your mobile phone (except hands-free)
Do not drive when fatigued
Obey traffic signs

subsections.title: Prohibitions
list: Transferring the vehicle to another person is prohibited
Taking the vehicle abroad is prohibited
Smoking in the vehicle is prohibited
Transporting pets (without special permission) is prohibited
Using the vehicle for racing or demonstrations is prohibited
Using the vehicle for illegal activities is prohibited

subsections.title: In Case of Accident
list: 1. Ensure your personal safety first
2. Call 112 if necessary
3. Notify police and traffic authorities
4. Call the RideYo support line (24/7)
5. Obtain an accident report
6. Photograph the scene and damage
7. Collect information from the other party

subsections.title: In Case of Breakdown
list: 1. Move the vehicle to a safe location
2. Place warning triangles
3. Call the RideYo support line
4. Wait for roadside assistance to arrive
5. Do not attempt repairs yourself

subsections.title: 24/7 Support Lines
paragraphs: Emergency Support: +90 5395263293
Roadside Assistance: +90 5395263293

subsections.title: Recommendations for Vehicle Owners
list: Maintain your vehicle regularly
Keep insurance and inspection documents up to date
Inspect the vehicle before and after rentals
Keep the GPS tracking system active
Check emergency equipment (first aid kit, fire extinguisher)
Do not make direct financial arrangements with renters
Conduct all transactions through the RideYo platform

subsections.title: Pickup
list: Have your reservation details ready
Bring your ID and driver's license
Complete the vehicle inspection form together
Record all damage and deficiencies
Note the fuel level

subsections.title: Return
list: Return the vehicle clean
Restore fuel level to the starting level
Do not leave belongings in the vehicle
Return all documents
Have a damage inspection performed
Sign the return form

sections.title: Penalties
paragraphs: If you fail to comply with safety rules:
list: Your account may be temporarily or permanently suspended
Penalties may be applied
You may fall outside insurance coverage
Legal proceedings may be initiated
Your deposit may not be refunded

sections.title: Reminder
paragraphs: These safety guidelines have been prepared for the safety of you and all RideYo users. By following the rules, you can enjoy a safe and pleasant vehicle sharing experience.
We wish you safe travels!
